title: cytisus × cetius
intro: Cytisus × kewensis, also known as Kew yellow pea or Cytisus × kewensis, is a hybrid plant of Cytisus scoparius and Laburnum alpinum, belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant's flowers and pods have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cytisus × kewensis include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as acting as a diuretic. Cytisus × kewensis is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
